name: automations
description: Hooks polyglot (format-on-edit: prettier/biome/ruff/black/gofmt/rustfmt/pint…; append-only guard), subagents (messagebus-reviewer, i18n-reviewer), /release command, allow-list + CLAUDE.md rules templates, y la skill optimize-my-setup que recomienda automatizaciones y deja al usuario elegir qué aplicar. Language-agnostic.
